v-01

Welcome, Coder!

Give your character block-by-block instructions to travel through the maze and reach the red flag. Snap blocks together, press Run, and watch your code come to life!

How to Play

  1. Pick a block category from the colourful tabs.
  2. Tap or drag blocks into "Your Program".
  3. Press "Run Program" to move your character.
  4. Reach the flag using as few blocks as you can!

Choose a Level

How to Play

  1. Pick a block category from the colourful tabs.
  2. Tap or drag blocks into "Your Program".
  3. Press "Run Program" to move your character.
  4. Reach the flag using as few blocks as you can!

Get Ready!

Tap to pick your character and background, then start.
